description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, clones the documentation.wiki repository from https://gitlab.com/our-sci/documentation.wiki.git, creates a .public directory, copies all files from documentation.wiki into .public, moves .public to a public directory, and publishes the public directory as a Pages artifact. The job should only run on the master branch.
